_comment: Source of truth for Pale Blue Nexus guests. Used by scripts/update-feed.mjs to build the Guests showcase, per-guest promo share pages, and to map YouTube videos -> guests for performance ranking. Add a new guest here (with their episode youtubeId) and the homepage + promo pages regenerate automatically.

guests.name: Jim Rogers
guests.quote: The most important thing to learn is what you love.
guests.bio: Co-founder of the Quantum Fund with George Soros. Returned 4,200% over ten years. Wrote Investment Biker and Adventure Capitalist after traveling through 116 countries. Now based in Singapore, still investing globally.

guests.name: Jack Couch
guests.role: Founder, Sophtron. Former Global VP of Payments, Xero.
guests.quote: Sales is dead. Podcasts are how trust gets built now.
guests.bio: Founder of Sophtron, building the open financial internet. Former Global VP of Payments at Xero. Founded Monchilla (acquired by Xero) and DeepIntel Solutions. A distribution operator who believes podcasts are the last channel where trust compounds.

guests.name: Austin Armstrong
guests.role: CEO, Syllaby. Managing Partner, Bullhouse Ventures.
guests.quote: The 40-hour work week is kind of BS.
guests.bio: More than 4 million followers across social media. CEO and co-founder of Syllaby, an AI startup helping creators produce, schedule, and publish video at speed. Managing Partner at Bullhouse Ventures. Best-selling author of VIRALITY!

guests.name: Nikola Borisov
guests.quote: Inference infrastructure is where the real compute war is fought.
guests.bio: DeepInfra just closed a $107M Series B led by 500 Global, with NVIDIA and Samsung Next participating. The company processes nearly 5 trillion tokens per week across its own GPU infrastructure in 8 US data centers and supports 190+ open-source models.

guests.name: Nectarios Economakis
guests.role: Partner, Amiral Ventures. Co-founder, The PNR.
guests.bio: Twenty years inside the Canadian tech ecosystem. First BD hire at Google Montreal, where he helped drive 50% year-over-year growth from 2011. Co-founded The PNR. Now Partner at Amiral Ventures, an early-stage and growth venture fund based in Montreal.

guests.name: Eliza Blank
guests.role: CEO, The Farmlink Project. Founder, The Sill.
guests.bio: Thirteen years building The Sill, the houseplant company that put 'plant parent' into the cultural vocabulary. Twelve stores, $25M raised, exited in 2024. Now CEO of The Farmlink Project, which moved 150 million pounds of rescued produce in 2025.

guests.name: Steve Gullans, PhD
guests.role: CEO, Thynk Inc. Co-founder, Excel Venture Management.
guests.bio: Eighteen years on Harvard Medical School faculty, 130+ scientific papers, AAAS Fellow. Co-founder of Excel Venture Management. Co-author of Evolving Ourselves with Juan Enriquez. Now CEO of Thynk Inc, applying cognitive training to ADHD and brain performance.

guests.name: Haren Bhakta, CFA
guests.role: Co-founder, Vault AI. Former Head of Product, Dapper Labs.
guests.bio: Built product at the intersection of AI and finance for over a decade. Former Head of Product at Dapper Labs (NBA Top Shot, Flow blockchain). Now co-founder of Vault AI, building intelligent infrastructure for financial services.
